content: Keycloak 26.6.0 (April 2026) is current; standard on-prem OSS OIDC IdP; supports identity brokering to external OIDC/SAML IdPs, organization groups mapping from external claims (26.6), RFC 7523 JWT authorization grant (26.5), federated client auth incl. Kubernetes SA tokens / SPIFFE (26.x). Good pilot default IdP and broker in front of customer Entra ID/Okta.
